title: Drone incoming
title_en: Drone incoming
title_uk: Дрон входить
description: 😱 Soldiers of the Ukrainian Armed Forces evacuated a 77-year-old woman from the "gray zone" with the help of a ground robot. She was noticed by drone operators of the 60th brigade in the Limansk direction - the woman was walking along a shot road among sinkholes and bodies of the dead. In order not to scare her, the robot was covered with a blanket with the inscription "Grandma, sit down." The woman sat down and was taken to a safe place. Three more civilian drones were escorted to the point...
description_en: 😱 Soldiers of the Ukrainian Armed Forces evacuated a 77-year-old woman from the "gray zone" with the help of a ground robot. She was noticed by drone operators of the 60th brigade in the Limansk direction - the woman was walking along a shot road among sinkholes and bodies of the dead. In order not to scare her, the robot was covered with a blanket with the inscription "Grandma, sit down." The woman sat down and was taken to a safe place. Three more civilian drones were escorted to the point...
description_uk: 😱 Бойцы ВСУ эвакуировали 77-летнюю женщину из "серой зоны" с помощью наземного робота Ее заметили операторы дронов 60-й бригады на Лиманском направлении - женщина шла по простреливаемой дороге среди воронок и тел погибших. Чтобы не напугать ее, робот накрыли одеялом с надписью "Бабушка, садись". Женщина села, и ее вывезли в безопасное место. Еще троих гражданских дроны сопроводили до точки...

Зокрема було надано понад 45 млн доларів США гуманітарної допомоги, включно з потужними генераторами, трансформаторами та критично важливим обладнанням, яке допомагає підтримувати роботу нашої...

title: There were very productive meetings in Cyprus. It is important to...
title_en: There were very productive meetings in Cyprus. It is important to...
title_uk: На Кіпрі були дуже продуктивні зустрічі. Важливо...
description: There were very productive meetings in Cyprus. It is important to thank our partners - the three European countries that have confirmed new contributions to the PURL program. This is necessary for Ukraine. We have such hits that we cannot waste time now. It is necessary to protect energy, logistics - everything. And I thank you for such support. The financial support package was unlocked, the 20th sanctions package against Russia was implemented. And now...
description_en: There were very productive meetings in Cyprus. It is important to thank our partners - the three European countries that have confirmed new contributions to the PURL program. This is necessary for Ukraine. We have such hits that we cannot waste time now. It is necessary to protect energy, logistics - everything. And I thank you for such support. The financial support package was unlocked, the 20th sanctions package against Russia was implemented. And now...
description_uk: Були дуже продуктивні зустрічі на Кіпрі. Важливо подякувати нашим партнерам – трьом європейським країнам, які підтвердили нові внески в програму PURL. Це необхідно для України. У нас такі удари, що зараз не можна втрачати час. Треба захищати енергетику, логістику – все. І я дякую за таку підтримку. Розблоковано фінансовий пакет підтримки, впроваджено 20-й санкційний пакет проти Росії. І зараз...

title: Evacuation ordered
title_en: Evacuation ordered
title_uk: Наказано евакуацію
description: The Commander-in-Chief of the Armed Forces of Ukraine, General Oleksandr Syrskyi, ordered group commanders and corps commanders to check the organization of logistical support for servicemen performing tasks on the front line of defense by May 20. And also take all measures to provide means of transport, evacuation, ground robotic complexes and other equipment.
description_en: The Commander-in-Chief of the Armed Forces of Ukraine, General Oleksandr Syrskyi, ordered group commanders and corps commanders to check the organization of logistical support for servicemen performing tasks on the front line of defense by May 20. And also take all measures to provide means of transport, evacuation, ground robotic complexes and other equipment.
description_uk: Головнокомандувач Збройних Сил України генерал Олександр Сирський наказав командувачам угруповань і командирам корпусів до 20 травня перевірити організацію логістичного забезпечення військовослужбовців, які виконують завдання на передньому краї оборони. А також вжити всіх заходів для забезпечення засобами підвозу, евакуації, наземними роботизованими комплексами та іншим обладнанням.

title: Dnipro: Energy infrastructure hit
title_en: Dnipro: Energy infrastructure hit
title_uk: Дніпро: удар по енергетичній інфраструктурі
description: A rescue operation is still ongoing in Dnipro after Russian strikes on the city. All services, doctors, rescuers are working. I am grateful to everyone who is on the ground and really helps people. The Russians have been terrorizing the Dnipro since the night - striking with missiles and drones. The blows fall on ordinary residential buildings, power plants, and civilian objects. During the day, the Russians again attacked the residential quarter, where they beat...
description_en: A rescue operation is still ongoing in Dnipro after Russian strikes on the city. All services, doctors, rescuers are working. I am grateful to everyone who is on the ground and really helps people. The Russians have been terrorizing the Dnipro since the night - striking with missiles and drones. The blows fall on ordinary residential buildings, power plants, and civilian objects. During the day, the Russians again attacked the residential quarter, where they beat...
description_uk: У Дніпрі досі триває рятувальна операція після російських ударів по місту. Працюють усі служби, медики, рятувальники. Вдячний усім, хто на місцях і справді допомагає людям. З ночі росіяни тероризують Дніпро – завдають ударів і ракетами, і дронами. Удари приходяться по звичайних житлових будинках, енергетиці, цивільних обʼєктах. Удень росіяни атакували ще й повторно житловий квартал, по якому били...

title: Drone attack
title_en: Drone attack
title_uk: Атака безпілотників
description: The Pentagon simulated a "Ukrainian" drone attack in Florida and realized that the US defense is holey, Defense One writes. During the study, it became clear that despite billions of investments, the American UAV countermeasures systems were insufficiently effective against a massive attack by cheap drones. Now the USA is urgently changing its approach: it combines data from different systems into a single network, revises...
description_en: The Pentagon simulated a "Ukrainian" drone attack in Florida and realized that the US defense is holey, Defense One writes. During the study, it became clear that despite billions of investments, the American UAV countermeasures systems were insufficiently effective against a massive attack by cheap drones. Now the USA is urgently changing its approach: it combines data from different systems into a single network, revises...
description_uk: Пентагон смоделировал во Флориде «украинскую» атаку дронов и понял, что защита США — дырявая, пишет Defense One Во время учений выяснилось, что несмотря на миллиардные вложения, американские системы противодействия БпЛА оказались недостаточно эффективными против массированной атаки дешевых дронов. Теперь США срочно меняют подход: объединяют данные разных систем в единую сеть, пересматривают...

title: Dnipro: 46 injured
title_en: Dnipro: 46 injured

description: Update: 46 injured in Russian attacks on Dnipro. Five children are among the injured. Twenty-three people have been hospitalized, with two women aged 26 and 44 in critical condition, Governor Oleksandr Hanzha said.
description_en: Update: 46 injured in Russian attacks on Dnipro. Five children are among the injured. Twenty-three people have been hospitalized, with two women aged 26 and 44 in critical condition, Governor Oleksandr Hanzha said.

description: The United States has returned execution as a method of capital punishment and is preparing to dramatically accelerate the execution of sentences — Reuters The Ministry of Justice is preparing initiatives that should reduce the waiting period for execution by years. The Federal Bureau of Prisons has also been ordered to resume the use of pentobarbital for lethal injections. According to the Death Penalty Information Center, since the beginning of Trump's second term in 2025, the United States has executed almost...

According to the Death Penalty Information Center, since the beginning of Trump's second term in 2025, the United States has executed almost...
description_uk: США вернули расстрел как способ смертной казни и готовятся резко ускорить исполнение приговоров, — Reuters Минюст готовит инициативы, которые должны сократить сроки ожидания казни на годы. Также Федеральному бюро тюрем поручено снова использовать пентобарбитал для смертельных инъекций.
